item.title: The Bitcoin Infinity Show – Announcing ProductionReady with Samson Mow & Jimmy Song | BIS #198
item.description:
Samson Mow and Jimmy Song join the Bitcoin Infinity Show to talk about ProductionReady, their new nonprofit funding a conservative third Bitcoin node client designed to preserve Bitcoin's monetary properties and break Core's monopoly on the reference implementation. The conversation covers the dangers of developer-driven feature creep, the inflation bug that slipped past Core review, why multiple client implementations strengthen Bitcoin's decentralization, and the case for prioritizing sound money over bleeding-edge changes. They also weigh in on BIP-110, the OP_RETURN controversy, Taproot's unintended consequences, and why the market wants Bitcoin left alone.

Connect with Samson, Jimmy, and ProductionReady:

https://x.com/Excellion

https://x.com/jimmysong

https://x.com/ProductionReady

https://productionready.org/

Connect with Us:

https://www.bitcoininfinityshow.com/

https://bitcoininfinitystore.com

https://primal.net/infinity

https://primal.net/knut

https://primal.net/luke

https://twitter.com/BtcInfinityShow

https://twitter.com/knutsvanholm

https://twitter.com/lukedewolf

Thanks to our sponsors - check out their websites for info:

Bull Bitcoin: https://app.bullbitcoin.com/registration/infinity

BitBox: https://bitbox.swiss/infinity - Use Code INFINITY for 5% off!

Bitcoin Adviser: https://content.thebitcoinadviser.com/freedom

The Bitcoin Infinity Show is a Bitcoin podcast hosted by Knut Svanholm and produced by Luke de Wolf.

]]>

item.title: Raoul Pal: The Journey Man – ETH, Tokenization, and the Future of Wall Street
item.description:
Raoul welcomes Vivek Raman, Co-Founder and CEO of Etherealize, and Danny Ryan, Co-Founder and President at Etherealize, to explore why Ethereum might just be the core infrastructure for Wall Street’s move into tokenization, stablecoins, and onchain finance. Raoul, Vivek and Danny also dig into how AI agents, privacy, scalability, and regulation could reshape the entire future of global financial markets. Recorded on April 1, 2026.
This May 5–7, join Real Vision CEO Raoul Pal at Consensus Miami with 20,000+ decision-makers from the White House, Wall Street, and Web3. From crypto at scale to institutional integration and agentic commerce, the conversations shaping what’s next happen here. Save 20% with code RAOUL at consensus.coindesk.com.

item.title: Bitcoin And | Bitcoin & Economic News – Retail: Round 2 | Bitcoin News
item.description:
Bitcoin news and economic news update. Today I cover bitcoin price strength as oil drops, Citi’s case for mixing bitcoin with gold, fresh U.S. government bitcoin movement tied to the Bitfinex hack, a new class action against Circle after the Drift exploit, SEC officials talking up U.S. crypto ambitions, Schwab’s spot bitcoin trading plans, Roman Storm’s Tornado Cash fight, and counterfeit Ledger devices sold in China. This episode leans into bitcoin analysis, financial news, bitcoin regulation, and the broader economics of bitcoin. 


Topics for today: 
  •  Bitcoin price pushes past $76,000 as oil drops and traders watch for a breakout 
  •  Citi says bitcoin and gold may work better together in portfolios 
  •  U.S. government moves seized bitcoin linked to the 2016 Bitfinex hack 
  •  Circle faces a class action lawsuit after the Drift protocol hack 
  •  SEC officials outline U.S. crypto ambitions in a new podcast appearance

item.title: Sound Money Bitcoin Podcast – #320 Deutsche Bundesbank mit 28 Milliarden Verlust – Wer zahlt die Rechnung?

item.title: Bitcoin Policy Institute – Bitcoin Policy Hour: Crypto-Redollarization: Gold, Tether & Bitcoin Shaping the New Monetary Order
item.description:
Why did Tether launch a U.S. stablecoin now? Why does Coinbase have so much influence in Congress? And what’s really behind the SEC–CFTC harmonization push? Bitcoin Policy Hour breaks down the biggest regulatory stories shaping Bitcoin’s future plus a deep look at the debasement trade driving gold, silver, and potentially bitcoin higher.🔶 Connect with Zack Shapiro on X: https://x.com/zackbshapiro🔶 Connect with Zack Cohen on X: https://x.com/zackcohen_🔶 Connect with Ken Egan on X: https://x.com/Bayman11771🔶 Learn more about the Bitcoin Policy Institute: https://www.btcpolicy.org/Chapters: 03:15 – Tether’s GENIUS-Compliant U.S. Stablecoin Explained 07:30 – Is Tether’s U.S. Launch a Political Hedge? 11:45 – Stablecoins, Circle, and Global Liquidity 15:30 – SEC–CFTC Harmonization and Regulatory Power 20:10 – Market Structure, BRCA, and Developer Protections 26:00 – Section 1960 and the National Security Debate 33:20 – Why Coinbase Has So Much Influence in Congress 41:00 – Stablecoin Yield, Banks, and Political Fatigue 47:00 – Gold, Silver, Debasement, and Bitcoin’s Moment

]]>

item.title: Blockspace: AI & Bitcoin – Justin Sun vs. Trump, Blackrock’s BTC Income ETF, and Why AI Trading Agents Aren’t That Good (Yet)
item.description:
Get your tickets to OPNEXT 2026 before prices increase! Join us on April 16 in NYC for technical discussions, investor talks, and intimate conversation with the brightest minds in Bitcoin.


Welcome back to The Blockspace Podcast! Today, Zack Pokorny from Galaxy Digital joins us to talk about AI crypto trading agents – specifically, why they aren’t ready for the big time just yet. We also dive into the evolving beef between World Liberty Financial and Tron’s Justin Sun following WLFI’s $75 million loan from a Dolomite lending pool. Plus, we cover Blackrock’s new bitcoin income ETF, discuss Circle’s refusal to freeze $270 million from the Lazarus Group Drift hack, and analyze last week’s $1.1 billion ETF inflow, the largest for crypto since January.


Subscribe to the newsletter! https://newsletter.blockspacemedia.com

Notes:

• WLFI treasury borrows $75M on Dolomite.

• Blackrock files for Bitcoin Income ETF.

• Trump family scrubbed from WLFI team member page.

• ETF inflows clock largest volume since January.

• Circle refuses to freeze Drift hack funds.


Timestamps:

00:00 Start

04:03 WLFI... umm WFT?

19:11 BITA covered call income

27:19 AI Agent & blockchains: a reality check

42:05 Circle & teken freezing

55:13 Coinshares high inflows


👉CleanSpark

CleanSpark (Nasdaq: CLSK) is a market-leading data center developer with a proven track record of success. We own a portfolio of power, land, and data centers across the United States powered by globally competitive energy prices. Sitting at the intersection of Bitcoin, energy, operational excellence and capital stewardship, we optimize our infrastructure to deliver superior returns to our shareholders. Monetizing low-cost, high reliability energy by producing a global emerging critical resource – compute – positions us to prosper in an ever-changing world.


👉Luxor, Blockspace's preferred mining pool

Bitcoin mining revenue changes every day. Difficulty adjusts. Fees move. Prices shift. And that makes it hard to plan. Luxor Pool’s Fixed Payouts let miners lock in revenue at a guaranteed daily rate for up to 18 months. According to Hashrate Index, miners who used rolling fixed payout strategies since the last halving have outperformed FPPS mining by up to 15 percent. Fixed Payouts give you predictable daily revenue, so you can plan, budget, and grow with confidence. With Luxor, uncertainty is optional. Learn more at luxor.tech/mining

Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

]]>

Bitcoin mining revenue changes every day. Difficulty adjusts. Fees move. Prices shift. And that makes it hard to plan. Luxor Pool’s Fixed Payouts let miners lock in revenue at a guaranteed daily rate for up to 18 months. According to Hashrate Index, miners who used rolling fixed payout strategies since the last halving have outperformed FPPS mining by up to 15 percent. Fixed Payouts give you predictable daily revenue, so you can plan, budget, and grow with confidence. With Luxor, uncertainty is optional. Learn more at luxor.tech/mining

Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

]]>

item.title: This Week in Bitcoin – 100: The Market Fit
item.description:
The pattern is getting harder to miss: the dollar loses power, and Bitcoin gains relevance. As war, sanctions, and financial stress expose the old system’s limits, the market is starting to recognize what Bitcoin was built for.

  • 🇺🇸 Buy Sats on River - The best way to stack in the US
  • 🇨🇦 The Bitcoin Well - An amazing automatic self-custody Bitcoin platform
  • ⚡ The Bitcoin Company - Spending your Bitcoin Via Lightning
  • 🏦 Fold Card - Pay bills Stack Sats
  • 💵 SALT Lending - Get access to your BTC Value w/out Selling

Boost Question:

  • Is Saylor Under-Selling Bitcoin's Potential On Purpose?

Show Notes:

  • US March PPI inflation rises to 4.0%, its highest since February 2023. Core PPI inflation was unchanged, at 3.8%
  • Covenant AI Leaves Bittensor Amid Decentralization Concerns, TAO Drops 18%
  • BitTensor AI Token Plunges as Top Builder Departs Over Decentralization Doubts - Decrypt
  • Bittensor's TAO Risks 45% Dip Amid 'Decentralization Theater' Accusations
  • Trump's Fed Pick Warsh Reveals Stake In Bitcoin Startup Flashnet
  • Bitcoin Moves Past Halfway Point In Halving Cycle As Supply Tightens Toward 2028
  • Fed chairman nominee Kevin Warsh's vast holdings include crypto
  • IMF warns about risk of global recession as Iran war impacts energy costs - YouTube

Music

  • Against All Love By: FM Rodeo
]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Magazine Podcast – Unmasking Satoshi Is Bad for Bitcoin | Bitcoin Policy Hour Episode 34
item.description:
The New York Times just published a major investigation claiming Adam Back is Satoshi Nakamoto and the hosts of Bitcoin Policy Hour think that's a problem. Ken Egan, Zack Shapiro, and Zack Cohen explain why Bitcoin was specifically designed so the founder's identity doesn't matter, and why unmasking Satoshi could do more harm than good. The conversation also covers the Iran conflict and the creative U.S. reverse blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, the truth behind viral claims about crypto being used for toll payments, BPI's new stablecoin policy paper on dollarization, and Anthropic's Mythos model, an AI so powerful they refuse to release it to the public. Click here to get 10% off bitcoin 2026 Conference in Las Vegas: https://tickets.b.tc/event/bitcoin-2026?promoCodeTask=apply&promoCodeInput=YT10🔶 Connect with Zack Shapiro on X: https://x.com/zackbshapiro🔶 Connect with Zack Cohen on X: https://x.com/zackcohen_🔶 Connect with Ken Egan on X: https://x.com/Bayman11771🔶 Learn more about the Bitcoin Policy Institute: https://www.btcpolicy.org/


CHAPTERS

0:00 — Introduction & What's Coming This Episode

5:12 — The U.S. Reverse Blockade Strategy in the Strait of Hormuz

11:15 — Is Bitcoin Really Being Used for Strait of Hormuz Tolls?

15:07 — BPI's Stablecoin Paper: Eurodollars, the GENIUS Act & Dollarization

22:13 — Bitcoin vs. Stablecoins: Sanctions, Compliance & the UTXO Advantage

28:49 — Trump's China Visit, Taiwan & the Geopolitical Chessboard

34:07 — NYT Claims Adam Back Is Satoshi: Examining the Evidence

40:15 — Why Satoshi's Identity Doesn't Matter for Bitcoin

47:16 — Anthropic's Mythos Model: AI Cyber Weapons & Zero-Day Exploits

55:45 — Should the Government Nationalize AI? Open Source, Regulation & the Future


#BitcoinPolicy #BitcoinPolicyHour #StraitOfHormuz #Iran #Stablecoins #GeniusAct #SatoshiNakamoto #AdamBack #Bitcoin #Anthropic #Mythos #AICybersecurity #ZeroDay #Dollarization #BitcoinGeopolitics #Eurodollars #ReverseBlockade #NickBhatia #BitcoinPolicyInstitute #TreasuryStrategy #PetroYuan #AINationalization #OpenSourceAI #BitcoinReserve #DigitalAssets


DISCLAIMER: The views and opinions expressed in this show are those of the participants and do not necessarily reflect the official policy or position of BTC Inc., Bitcoin Magazine, or any affiliated entities. This content is provided for informational and educational purposes only and should not be construed as investment, legal, tax, or accounting advice. Nothing contained in this show constitutes a solicitation, recommendation, endorsement, or offer to buy or sell any securities or financial instruments. Viewers should consult their own advisors before making financial or business decisions.

]]>

item.title: Store of Bitcoin - Bitcoin as Store of Value – Ep. 49 - Daniel Batten | A new different wave of Bitcoin Adopters.
item.description:
In this episode of Store of Bitcoin, host Alessandro Ottaviani welcomes Daniel Batten, a prominent Bitcoin analyst and investor, to discuss the evolving narrative surrounding Bitcoin, particularly in relation to energy consumption and environmental impact. Daniel shares insights on how the mainstream media's perception of Bitcoin has shifted from skepticism to a more favorable view, largely due to rigorous research and advocacy from the Bitcoin community. He emphasizes the importance of effectively communicating Bitcoin's benefits to various stakeholders, including policymakers and investors, to foster broader adoption.

The conversation delves into the challenges of reaching new adopters, particularly those who may not be motivated by the same values that initially attracted early Bitcoin enthusiasts. Daniel highlights the need for a more nuanced approach to education and outreach, focusing on the social and environmental benefits of Bitcoin. He also discusses the potential for Bitcoin to serve as a tool for financial inclusion in developing countries, where it can provide a safeguard against inflation and empower individuals in oppressive regimes. The episode concludes with a look at future trends in Bitcoin adoption and the importance of aligning messaging with the values of diverse audiences.

This episode is sponsored by ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠BitVault⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, the new open-source & self-custody wallet utilizing time-delays and multisignature to offset physical attacks and hacks.

item.title: Der Bitcoin Kompass: Wegweiser im Kaninchenbau – Folge 5: Der Bitcoin-Preis – Zwischen Angebot, Nachfrage und Geldpolitik
item.description:
Was bestimmt eigentlich den Bitcoin-Preis? In Folge 5 vom Bitcoin-Kompass sprechen wir üeber eines der meistdiskutierten Themen im Bitcoin-Space: den Preis. Dabei geht es nicht um Prognosen oder Kaufempfehlungen, sondern um ein grundlegendes Verständnis dafüer, wie der Bitcoin-Preis entsteht und welche Kraefte ihn beeinflussen.


Wir erklären, wie Angebot und Nachfrage auf Bitcoin-Börsen funktionieren, warum das Handelsvolumen oft wichtiger ist als der Preis selbst und welche Rolle die Marktkapitalisierung spielt. Ausserdem beleuchten wir die grossen Einflussfaktoren: das Bitcoin-Halving und den Vier-Jahres-Zyklus, die Geldpolitik der US-Notenbank (Fed), Inflation und die wachsenden Staatsschulden der USA. Im Vergleich zwischen Bitcoin und Gold zeigen sie, warum Bitcoin technologisch ueberlegen sein könnte - und warum der Preis letztlich ein Spiegel des wachsenden Vertrauens in diese neue Technologie ist.


Mehr Infos, interaktive Grafiken zur Marktkapitalisierung und Kontaktmoeglichkeiten findet ihr auf:


Webseite: https://derbitcoinkompass.ch

E-Mail: kontakt@derbitcoinkompass.ch

Telegram: https://t.me/btc_kaninchenbau


Feedback und Fragen gerne per E-Mail, ueber Telegram oder ueber unsere Webseite.



(00:00:00) Begruessung & Einfuehrung ins Thema Preis

(00:01:31) Volatilitaet und der aktuelle Bitcoin-Preis

(00:02:33) Kaufkraft, Inflation und warum Menschen investieren

(00:05:20) Marktkapitalisierung: Bitcoin vs. Gold vs. Immobilien vs. Aktien

(00:08:05) Wie entsteht der Bitcoin-Preis? Angebot & Nachfrage erklaert

(00:11:04) Warum das Handelsvolumen entscheidend ist

(00:12:43) Die grossen Einflussfaktoren auf den Bitcoin-Preis

(00:13:26) In was messen wir den Preis? Euro, Dollar oder Aepfel?

(00:17:03) Warum Geld kein stabiler Massstab ist

(00:18:10) Bitcoins festes Angebot: Maximal 21 Millionen

(00:20:02) Das Halving und der Vier-Jahres-Zyklus

(00:24:22) Die Fed, Zinspolitik und US-Staatsschulden

(00:31:27) Was bedeutet das alles fuer den Bitcoin-Preis?

(00:33:37) Bitcoin vs. Gold: Vorteile und Unterschiede

(00:40:30) Preisprognose: Bitcoin auf 1 Million Dollar?

(00:41:54) Zusammenfassung & Verabschiedung

]]>

item.title: Rob Wallace | Bitcoin News – They Escaped 40 Years of Terror – Now El Salvador Is Building a New Civilization
item.description:
Is El Salvador the most important country in Bitcoin right now? We went straight to the source.

Rob Wallace sits down with Michael Ruiz (Build in El Salvador) and Jethro Toro (Bitcoin Country Podcast), two Americans living full-time in El Salvador, for a ground-level report on what's actually happening in Bitcoin Country in 2026.

They cover Bitcoin Beach's evolution into a global tourist destination, the Berlin circular economy growing toward 200 merchants, and why Samson Mao called it "the most circular of circular Bitcoin economies."

They break down President Bukele's Bitcoin and AI strategy, Stacy Herbert's Bitcoin Office education initiatives (including the What Is Money curriculum for kids ages 7+, the Bitcoin Diploma, and Kubo Plus developer training), and the race between low time preference Bitcoin capital and high time preference fiat development.

They also make the case for why El Salvador may be the single best place in the world to build a Bitcoin business right now: zero tax on tech companies, first-mover advantage across nearly every sector, and a government actively recruiting builders.

Topics covered:

Life as an American expat in El Salvador in 2026

Bitcoin Beach vs. Bitcoin Berlin and how the two circular economies compare

Cubo+, the Bitcoin Diploma, and Bitcoin education in Salvadoran schools

The Bitcoin Office and AI Agency under Stacy Herbert

Bukele's approval rating, key man risk, and El Salvador's geopolitical positioning

Business opportunities in tourism, construction, real estate, agriculture, and tech

El Salvador and the Fourth Turning and why it may be the best place to weather a global supply shock

Spanish, culture shock, and the frontier spirit pulling Bitcoiners from around the world

]]>

item.title: BITCOIN & ALTCOINS – Die US-Indizes entscheiden jetzt über die Richtung
item.description:
Gescheiterte Friedensverhandlungen, Spannungen rund um die Straße von Hormus und ein Ölpreis auf Achterbahnfahrt. Trotz all dieser Nachrichten zeigen sich die Märkte erstaunlich robust: US-Aktien, Bitcoin und viele Altcoins konnten zum Wochenstart sogar wieder zulegen. Doch woher rührt diese Stabilität? Ob es sich hier um eine kurzfristig neue Euphorie handelt, beantwortet Oliver Michel (tokentus investment AG) in der aktuellen Folge von „BITCOIN & ALTCOINS“.

Hinweis: Die im Podcast besprochenen Coins und Token stellen keine spezifischen Kauf- oder Anlageempfehlungen dar. Die Moderatoren oder der Verlag haften nicht für etwaige Verluste, die aufgrund der Umsetzung der im Podcast diskutierten Gedanken oder Ideen entstehen.

Das Gespräch wurde am 14.04.2026 an der Frankfurter Börse aufgezeichnet.

Tägliche Informationen gefällig? Dann ab zu „Krypto-Insights“ – dem Telegram-Kanal von Oliver Michel und Johanna Krämer. Weitere Infos unter www.krypto-insights.de

]]>

item.title: State of Bitcoin with Brandon Keys – I Spoke To Bitcoin's Most Connected Insider. He Told Me Everything with David Bailey - State of Bitcoin Ep. 237
item.description:
David Bailey reveals that 30-40 countries are secretly mining Bitcoin and 10+ nations are quietly building strategic Bitcoin reserves. The CEO of Nakamoto and Bitcoin Magazine joins Brandon to break down the Nakamoto-BTC Inc merger, why Bitcoin treasury companies are struggling, how the convertible note strategy backfired, what the Trump administration has actually delivered for Bitcoin, and why the nation-state Bitcoin race is bigger than anyone realizes.

David shares hard-won lessons from his first year as a public company CEO, explains why you can't out-Saylor Saylor, and reveals the asymmetric advantage of accumulating Bitcoin in a bear market. He also discusses why no government wants to announce their Bitcoin holdings — and why that's about to change.

Guest: David Bailey — CEO of Nakamoto, Founder of Bitcoin Magazine & BTC Inc

Twitter: @DavidFBailey

item.title: The Why Bitcoin Show – #99 - Mastered Self-Custody. Failed At Inheritance Planning
item.description:
Self-custody is only half the job.

In this episode of The Why Bitcoin Show, I unpack one of the most overlooked risks in Bitcoin: inheritance. Because it’s one thing to secure your bitcoin while you’re alive — it’s another thing entirely to make sure the people you love can actually access it if you die.

I break down the three major gaps most Bitcoiners have in their inheritance planning: the technical gap, the legal gap, and the education gap. I also walk through the common options people rely on — from doing nothing, to using a generic will template, to hiring a lawyer, to handing everything over to a custodian — and explain where each approach can fall short.

Most importantly, this is a practical episode. I share the key questions every Bitcoiner should be able to answer, what a solid inheritance plan actually looks like, and why inheritance planning is not morbid or pessimistic — it’s the completion of self-custody.

I also explain why I built My Bitcoin Will, a DIY Bitcoin inheritance starter kit designed to help people get off zero and start closing the gap between law, access, and education.

If you’re not ready to dive in yet, you can start with the free Bitcoin Inheritance Stress Test or download the checklist at My Bitcoin Will.

Also, some gentle shilling from my side....if you don't know, I've written a book! - No Tenants, No Troubles: The Case for Digital Over Real Estate. Available for purchase on Amazon NOW: ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠https://www.dalewarburton.com/book⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠

Need a hand with self-custody? Book a⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠session ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠with me to get your Bitcoin security house in order.

And also, here's my npub - get going on Nostr, it's a game-changer. npub1r94hh3kt6re3j5jv7yg8rw0ah5fg90vw9pjklxzknvhdkx0famfsn0njzt


]]>

item.title: THE Bitcoin Podcast – Bitcoin Needs a Crisis | Rob Wallace
item.description:
Rob Wallace from Bitcoin News is not your typical Bitcoiner, this is a guy who spent four years living in Shanghai, bought his first 2.2 bitcoin at an ATM in 2016… only to have them stolen at a Las Vegas airport. We cover the macro chaos unfolding around us, why Eastern Europe might be civilization's last immune system, and what the Fourth Turning actually looks like from the inside. We dig deep into the corporate Bitcoin treasury mania: who's holding the line and who already blinked. Mainly, we discuss why the next wave of bitcoin adoption will come from a crisis.

FOLLOW ROB:

X: https://x.com/\_Rob_Wallace

Bitcoin News on X: https://x.com/bitcoinnewscom

Bitcoin News' website: https://bitcoinnews.com/

Key Topics:

  • Bitcoin adoption needs a crisis
  • Media landscape
  • Macroeconomic trends
  • Treasury companies
  • Bitcoin's future

PARTNERS & DISCOUNTS:

  • LEDN: Bitcoin-backed lending. Go to ledn.io/walker and unlock liquidity WITHOUT selling your bitcoin.

item.title: Bitcoiners - Live From Bitcoin Beach – The New Bitcoin Standard Is Here (And No One Is Talking About It) | Rod Roudi, Jack Lesser and Andrew Davis of Bitcoin Park
item.description:
Is your body a fiat liability? Proof of Work is a biological law that your private keys cannot fix. We examine why the ultimate 2026 luxury is a total Digital Detox and the physical sovereignty found in a Bitcoin Citadel.

Is it possible to be a sovereign individual if your body is a product of the fiat food system and your mind is enslaved by a dopamine loop? This episode destroys the myth that Bitcoin is merely a line on a chart. We argue that proof of work is a universal law for your physical, mental, and financial existence. The Bitcoin Park (@bitcoinpark_) crew joins us at Bitcoin Beach to explain how to achieve a digital detox and reclaim your humanity.

Rod Roudi shares the grit required to scale a grassroots movement into a premier physical fortress. By securing an off-market facility, they created a high-signal sanctuary for those exiting the legacy system. We discuss their membership model and why physical citadels are essential for the deep collaboration needed to survive the coming decade.

Jack Lesser introduces a framework for three wellness pillars: spiritual, physical, and financial health. We delve into the mind-body connection and why a low-time-preference life requires discipline to maintain your own human hardware through movement and presence. Walking barefoot on a beach while ignoring the noise of the internet will soon be the rarest luxury on earth.

We analyze Austrian economics in El Salvador. Seeing a circular economy in action, where teenagers build local businesses on a Bitcoin standard, provides a humbling check for the West. This is a functioning alternative to the broken financial system that solves problems for the unbanked and marginalized.

We wrap with the convergence of freedom tech, AI, and energy. As these collide, censorship-resistant infrastructure becomes a matter of survival. Through nuclear energy mining or Nostr, we are building tools for a future that favors the individual over the institution.

—Bitcoin Beach Team

item.itunes:summary:
Is your body a fiat liability? Proof of Work is a biological law that your private keys cannot fix. We examine why the ultimate 2026 luxury is a total Digital Detox and the physical sovereignty found in a Bitcoin Citadel.

Is it possible to be a sovereign individual if your body is a product of the fiat food system and your mind is enslaved by a dopamine loop? This episode destroys the myth that Bitcoin is merely a line on a chart. We argue that proof of work is a universal law for your physical, mental, and financial existence. The Bitcoin Park (@bitcoinpark_) crew joins us at Bitcoin Beach to explain how to achieve a digital detox and reclaim your humanity.

Rod Roudi shares the grit required to scale a grassroots movement into a premier physical fortress. By securing an off-market facility, they created a high-signal sanctuary for those exiting the legacy system. We discuss their membership model and why physical citadels are essential for the deep collaboration needed to survive the coming decade.

Jack Lesser introduces a framework for three wellness pillars: spiritual, physical, and financial health. We delve into the mind-body connection and why a low-time-preference life requires discipline to maintain your own human hardware through movement and presence. Walking barefoot on a beach while ignoring the noise of the internet will soon be the rarest luxury on earth.

We analyze Austrian economics in El Salvador. Seeing a circular economy in action, where teenagers build local businesses on a Bitcoin standard, provides a humbling check for the West. This is a functioning alternative to the broken financial system that solves problems for the unbanked and marginalized.

We wrap with the convergence of freedom tech, AI, and energy. As these collide, censorship-resistant infrastructure becomes a matter of survival. Through nuclear energy mining or Nostr, we are building tools for a future that favors the individual over the institution.

item.title: All In Bitcoin – 030 Jameson Lopp: Why Privacy Is Losing & Bitcoin's Next War I All In Bitcoin w/CK
item.description:
🎙️ Jameson Lopp: Why Privacy Is Losing & Bitcoin's Next War.

Privacy is breaking. Bitcoin is under pressure. And most people don’t see it coming.

In this episode with Jameson Lopp, we go deep into the reality behind digital privacy, online attacks, and the growing tensions inside Bitcoin.

Jameson explains the real reasons behind his swatting, how misinformation and bots are reshaping online narratives, and why protecting privacy is becoming harder than ever. We also unpack the Knots vs Core debate and what it reveals about Bitcoin’s future.

This is a conversation about power, control, and responsibility in Bitcoin and beyond.

Article discussed in this episode:

“It’s Knot a Serious Project” by Jameson Lopp

item.title: No Second Best - A Bitcoin Podcast – Did the Federal Reserve Just Open the Door to Bitcoin?
item.description:
Jamie Dimon just went on national television to push back against Bitcoin and crypto legislation. Hours later, a Bitcoin exchange gained direct access to the Federal Reserve's settlement rails.

At the same time, Morgan Stanley filed for a spot Bitcoin ETF while geopolitical tensions escalated in the Middle East and Bitcoin surged.

This episode breaks down the growing conflict between the traditional banking system and the emerging Bitcoin financial infrastructure, and why the global monetary system may already be bending toward neutral, hard money.

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock'n'Roll – State of Stablecoins 2026: Architecture, Power, and Risk
item.description:
In this solo episode of Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll, co-host Michael Blaschke steps away from the usual interview format to unpack a topic that is rapidly moving from crypto niche to systemic relevance: stablecoins. The episode is built around his newly published study with the FERI Cognitive Finance Institute, “Stablecoins: How Tokenized Money is Changing the Global Financial Architecture,” co-authored with Dr. Heinz-Werner Rapp.

This is not a hype-driven discussion about token prices. It is a deep dive into the monetary layer of the token economy: why tokenized assets need tokenized money, why stablecoins are emerging as the dominant settlement instrument, and why this shift matters for banks, regulators, corporates and policymakers.

Michael introduces the study’s two-pillar model: tokenized assets on one side, tokenized money on the other. He explains why a digital bond or tokenized fund remains incomplete if settlement still depends on slow legacy payment rails, limited business hours and correspondent banking chains. Stablecoins, in this view, are not just another crypto asset. They are the missing monetary infrastructure.

The episode also explores the scale of the market, the role of stablecoins in US Treasury demand, the geopolitical implications of dollar dominance, and the widening gap between Europe’s regulatory leadership and America’s strategic push. Michael examines the core risks institutions need to understand: depegs, reserve quality, intermediary fragility, regulatory shocks and run dynamics in 24/7 markets.

A major focus is Europe’s response under MiCA, including euro-denominated initiatives such as AllUnity and the Kivalis consortium. Looking ahead, the episode also connects stablecoins with the rise of agentic AI, asking what happens when autonomous systems begin to rely on programmable, always-on digital money.

This is a dense but practical episode for anyone working in institutional DLT, treasury, payments, compliance, digital assets or financial infrastructure. If you want to understand how tokenized money could reshape global finance, this is the episode to start with.

Blaschke & Rapp (2026) — "Stablecoins: How Tokenized Money Is Changing the Global Financial Architecture," published by the FERI Cognitive Finance Institute (the study that the episode is built around).

FERI Cognitive Finance Institute press release

Michael Blaschke on LinkedIn

Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll Website

Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll Telegram Channel Brunnermeier & Niepelt (2019) — Referenced for the argument that private and public money can be economically equivalent, but only under specific conditions (equivalence breaks down when trust in the private issuer erodes).

Lyons & Viswanath-Natraj (2020) — Analyzed the stablecoin peg mechanism and compared arbitrageurs to authorized participants in the ETF market.

Gorton & Zhang (Yale) — Compared bond-based stablecoins (Tether, Circle) to the Wildcat Banks of 19th-century America, i.e., private money issuers backed by reserves with historically mixed results.

Ahmed & Aldasoro (BIS working paper, 2026) — "Stablecoins and Safe Asset Prices" — Empirically demonstrated that stablecoin inflows depress three-month US Treasury bill yields by 2.5 to 3.5 basis points (5 to 8 basis points during tight supply periods).

Diamond & Dybvig (1983) — The classic bank run model showing that coordinated withdrawals can be individually rational even when the institution is fundamentally solvent; applied by Michael to the stablecoin context.

Disclaimer: The content of this podcast reflects the private opinions of the hosts, serves exclusively for general information purposes and does not constitute investment advice. Always remember: Do your own research—inform yourself before making any investment decisions, such as buying Bitcoin. First try to understand what Bitcoin is and how to store it. This podcast does not provide financial advice. Note that the co-hosts might be invested in crypto assets. Read more on our website: Click here

All links marked with "*" are affiliate links. If you use these links for purchase, the podcast receives a small share of the revenue without any additional costs to you. On the contrary, affiliate links often include discount promotions, so you can even save money. We would appreciate it if you use these links to support us. Thank you very much!

item.title: BitBucks Bitcoin Podcast – Bitcoin und Deutschland: Wo stehen wir und wo kann die Reise hingehen? #6 mit Larry
item.description:
Herzlich willkommen zum BitBucks Bitcoin Podcast(https://www.bitbucks.de)!

Heute haben wir einen besonderen Gast: Larry, bekannt als @B1tcoin3r auf X. Larry ist ein erfahrener Bitcoin-Experte, Vortragsredner und Workshop-Host. Dank seines weitreichenden Netzwerks in führenden Positionen bringt er tiefgehende Einblicke in die aktuelle Bitcoin-Situation in Deutschland mit. Gemeinsam sprechen wir über die deutsche Bitcoin-Politik, die Auswirkungen der neuen Regierung und die mögliche Zukunft von Bitcoin in Deutschland.

Viel Spaß beim Zuhören!

Zudem reden wir auch noch über die Themen:

- Die aktuelle Bitcoin Lage in Deutschland (Adaption, Beliebtheit)

- Lösungen für eine Bitcoin Adaption

- Einfluss der Politik auf Bitcoin

- Ob Bitcoin die Politik überhaupt braucht- Bitcoin und Unternehmen bzw. Start-Ups

- Wie viele Jahre es dauern wird, bis Deutschland Bitcoin als offizielles Zahlungsmittel einführt

- Bitcoin Städte Spiel: Errate die fünf beliebtesten Bitcoin Städte weltweit

- Wie Bitcoin Larrys Leben verändert hat

- Glaskugel: Bitcoin Preis am Ende des Jahres 2025Podcast Folge auf Spotify:

---------------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.bitbucks.de/Apple Download: https://apps.apple.com/de/app/bitcoin-wallet-bitbucks/id1453167599

Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=de.fuf.bitbucks&pli=1

https://www.instagram.com/bit_bucks/

https://www.linkedin.com/company/bitbucks/

https://www.tiktok.com/@bitbucks

https://x.com/bit_bucksPodcast auf Spotify:

----------------------------------------------------------------------

Vernetz dich gerne mit den Rednern :)

LinkedIn Konsti Schwemlein: https://www.linkedin.com/in/konstantin-schwemlein/

X/Twitter Larry: https://x.com/B1tcoin3r

--------------------------------------------------------------

TimeStamps:

00:00 Intro

01:15 Wie bist du zu Bitcoin gekommen?

03:20 Wie steht es um Bitcoin in Deutschland?

07:45 Thema Bitcoin: Bevölkerung vs. Unternehmen/Politik

12:46 Was sind deine Verbesserungsvorschläge?

15:15 Wie kann die deutsche Politik Bitcoin integrieren?

17:28 Gleicht eine Bitcoin Reserve die Staatsschulden aus?

19:50 Wird eine CDU Regierung das Thema Bitcoin fördern?

22:38 Warum setzen sich die Grünen nicht für Bitcoin ein?

27:18 Warum gibt es nicht mehr Bitcoin Unternehmen?

30:12 Braucht Bitcoin die Politik überhaupt?

33:15 Wann wird Bitcoin in DE gesetzliches Zahlungsmittel?

57:20 Outro

item.title: Bitcoin Audible – Read_939 - Modern Money Only Works By Cheating - Part 2
item.description:
“what matters now is not belief, but endurance.
bitcoin does not promise comfort. it does not promise justice. it does not promise to save anyone. it offers one thing only: a set of rules that do not bend to price, politics, or persuasion. whether that is valuable depends entirely on who is holding it and why.
the mathematics will almost certainly hold long enough. the question has always been whether we will.”

~ Hugh Hendry

Today, we are back with part two of Tyler Durden's piece "Modern Money Only Works By Cheating".

Most people think the ultimate danger to Bitcoin is quantum computers cracking the math. But this article highlights something far scarier: human coordination. I read through the rest of the essay, which asks a brutal question. If Bitcoin ever needs to change to survive a threat, can a network built on resisting authority act together without a leader? Or will we just splinter into stubborn factions?

Because Bitcoin's rules don't bend, the pressure falls entirely on us. I share my thoughts on the read, explaining why the Block Size War was a preview of this exact test, and where I push back heavily on the author's defense of fiat money.

Check out the original article: Modern Money Only Works By Cheating by Tyler Durden (Link: https://www.zerohedge.com/crypto/modern-money-only-works-cheating-if-youre-long-bitcoin-or-not-long-bitcoin-read)

References from the episode

  • Part 1 of this Read -- go back and catch up if you haven't. (Link: https://fountain.fm/episode/UN8NHIQ3tR9tdc9ER89h)
  • Hugh Henry's article Bitcoin in the Problem of Hardness on his Substack -- that's the main one we dove into. (Link: https://hughhendry.substack.com/p/bitcoin-and-the-problem-of-hardness)
  • Hugh's other piece Bitcoin and the Human Problem is worth a read for the full picture. (Link: https://hughhendry.substack.com/p/5f0)

Host Links

  • ⁠Guy on Nostr ⁠(Link: http://tinyurl.com/2xc96ney)
  • ⁠Guy on X ⁠(Link: https://twitter.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on Instagram (Link: https://www.instagram.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on TikTok (Link: https://www.tiktok.com/@theguyswann)
  • Guy on YouTube (Link: https://www.youtube.com/@theguyswann)
  • ⁠Bitcoin Audible on X⁠ (Link: https://twitter.com/BitcoinAudible)
  • The Guy Swann Network Broadcast Room on Keet (Link: https://tinyurl.com/3na6v839)

Check out our awesome partners!

  • Become sovereign, hold your keys, be censorship resistant with the Bitbox hardware wallet. Get 5% off everything in the store with code GUY (Link: https://bitbox.swiss/)
  • Get ⁠10% off the COLDCARD⁠ with code BITCOINAUDIBLE ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠(Link: https://bitcoinaudible.com/coldcard)
  • Get 10% off the best Bitcoin board game in the world, HODLUP! Or any of the other great games from The Free Market Kids! Use code GUY10 at checkout for 10% off your cart! (Link: https://www.freemarketkids.com/collections/games-1)

“Imagination does not become great until human beings, given the courage and the strength, use it to create.”

~ Maria Montessori

]]>

In this episode of Bitcoin Banter, Michael, Tony, and guest Sophi discuss whether Michael Saylor can stack 1 million Bitcoin - and whether that’s actually good news for Bitcoiners.

They also talk about the proposal to freeze quantum-exposed coins, Pakistan’s reversal on their Bitcoin ‘ban’, ‘Easy Money’ author Ben Mackenzie’s latest documentary on cryptocurrency and Professor Jiang’s controversial Bitcoin claims.

item.title: Thank God for Bitcoin – To The Unknown Pod Episode 41: A Review of the BCE on Bitcoin Beach and The Plan B Conference in El Salvador
item.description:
In this episode of To the Unknown Pod, Jordan Bush and Ahshuwah Hawthorne discuss their experiences at the Bitcoin Beach and the Global Bitcoin Circular Economy Summit in El Salvador. They share insights on the innovative ways communities around the world are utilizing Bitcoin, the importance of networking and spiritual conversations at the forum, and their vision for future collaborations to build a stronger community around Bitcoin and the Christian faith.

item.title: BTC-ECHO | Bitcoin & Krypto Podcasts – Marktupdate #53 | US-Aktien kurz vor Allzeithoch – ziehen Bitcoin & Altcoins jetzt nach?
item.description:
Können Bitcoin & Co. zu den Aktien aufschließen?

In diesem Marktupdate analysieren wir, ob die zurückkehrende Risikoaffinität der Anleger auch den Kryptomarkt nachhaltig nach oben treiben kann – oder ob Bitcoin weiterhin hinterherhinkt.

Außerdem schauen wir auf: – Warum steigende Aktienmärkte aktuell wichtiger sind als geopolitische Risiken

– Wieso Altcoins trotz BTC-Stärke noch nicht nachziehen

– Ob wir am Beginn einer neuen Risk-On-Phase stehen

– Und welche Faktoren jetzt über den nächsten großen Move entscheiden

📊 Klar ist: Die nächsten Tage könnten richtungsentscheidend werden – für Bitcoin, Altcoins und den gesamten Markt.

item.title: Bald in Bitcoin – Bald in Bitcoin - Folge 10: Bitcoin & Steuern: So vermeidest du später richtig Stress
item.description:
Worum es in dieser Folge geht Bitcoin-Steuern verstehen: Ereignisse statt Besitz Warum Dokumentation entscheidend ist Die 7 wichtigsten Datenpunkte für deine Übersicht Transfers richtig einordnen Ein einfaches System für deine Bitcoin-Dokumentation Tools wie CoinTracking sinnvoll nutzen Häufige Fehler vermeiden

Die wichtigsten Takeaways Steuern entstehen durch Handlungen – nicht durch Besitz Dokumentation ist deine „Stressversicherung“ Transfers sind steuerlich meist neutral – aber dokumentarisch entscheidend Ein einfaches System schlägt Perfektion 10 Minuten pro Quartal reichen völlig aus

Praktischer Ansatz aus der Folge

Option A:

Ordnerstruktur (Käufe, Verkäufe, Transfers, Steuern) einfache Excel-Tabelle

Option B:

Quartalsroutine CSV exportieren Belege sichern Tabelle aktualisieren

Tools (optional) CoinTracking andere Portfolio-/Steuer-Tools

Wichtig:

nicht blind vertrauen Daten prüfen API nur read-only nutzen

Häufige Fehler „Ich merk mir das schon“ keine Belege sichern mehrere Plattformen ohne Übersicht Gebühren ignorieren Transfers nicht dokumentieren

]]>

item.title: VERIFIED by Bitcoin Suisse – Every Time Crypto Failed, It Came Back 10x Bigger
item.description:
Every time crypto has failed, it came back bigger. Charles Hoskinson — co-founder of Ethereum and founder of Cardano — joins Dominic Weibel and Wolfgang Vitale on Verified to break down why 2025's underperformance may actually be setting up for crypto's biggest leap yet. From inconsistent U.S. policy and ETF ring-fencing to retail losses from structured-product speculation, the divergence was real but so is the setup.


The conversation goes deep: institutional capture vs. the cypherpunk ethos, custodial apps winning users by default, Bitcoin's quantum vulnerability and DARPA timelines, the tokenomics that could drive the next adoption cycle, AI-driven job displacement, and why onchain governance is no longer optional. This is the conversation most people in crypto aren't having.

]]>

item.title: House of Satoshi - Bitcoin und Friends – #55 Bitcoinpreis schwach, Fundamentaldaten intakt: Dominik Weibel über Bitcoins Lage 2026
item.description:
Im Februar 2026 wurde Bitcoin so oft für tot erklärt wie noch nie in einem Monat. Gleichzeitig kaufen institutionelle Investoren, steigt die Hashrate, und die Daten auf der Blockchain zeigen ein völlig anderes Bild. Was stimmt hier nicht zusammen?

Heute zu Gast: Dominik Weibel, Head of Research bei Bitcoin Suisse.

Was dich in dieser Episode erwartet:

  • Warum der Preis lügt und die Fundamentaldaten nicht..
  • Die zweite institutionelle Welle steht bevor.
  • Great Wealth Transfer bis 2045: 90% der Krypto-Halter sind unter 40.
  • Wie man eine Anlage ohne Cashflows trotzdem seriös einordnen kann.
  • Die grossen Risiken der nächsten Dekade

Ressourcen aus dieser Episode:

Bitcoin Suisse Research (Outlook, Wealth Report, Podcast):

https://bitcoinsuisse.com/de/research

Bitcoin-Todeserklärungen - alle dokumentiert:

https://bitcoindeaths.com/

Was ist UTXO?

https://www.house-of-satoshi.ch/leitfaden-zu-bitcoin-transaktionen-verstehe-wie-utxo-funktioniert/

📬 Unser Newsletter - Bitcoin & Krypto kompakt und verständlich, direkt für Schweizer Anleger:

https://www.house-of-satoshi.ch/newsletter/


Folge dem Podcast und hinterlasse eine Bewertung. Das hilft uns enorm. 🙏

]]>

item.title: BTC-ECHO Recap | Top-Stories zu Bitcoin & Kryptowährungen – Wir sind umgezogen!
21Focus - Der Bitcoin-Unternehmer Podcast – Aus der Banken IT in die Welt von Bitcoin - Harald Betz
item.description:
Folge #61 – Ein Gespräch über Banken IT und Bitcoin Bücher

Harald Beetz ist seit fast 20 Jahren selbstständig in der Beratung für Banken und Rechenzentren. Angefangen als Banklehrling bei der Sparkasse, hat er früh den Wandel von Beratung hin zu reinem Vertrieb erlebt und sich auf IT-Projekte spezialisiert. In diesem Gespräch erzählt er, wie er von der Banken IT zu Bitcoin kam, warum er mit seiner Frau einen Roman über Geld schrieb und wie er sich heute zwischen Beratung und Content rund um Bitcoin positioniert.


Du erfährst,

  • wie Harald die Bankenwelt von innen erlebt hat,
  • welche Herausforderungen und Chancen es als IT-Berater gibt,
  • warum er Bitcoin zunächst wieder verkaufte und später mit völlig anderem Blick neu entdeckte,
  • wie aus einer Buchidee seiner Frau ein gemeinsames Projekt wurde
  • und welche unternehmerischen Lektionen er aus fast zwei Jahrzehnten Selbstständigkeit mitnimmt.


Kapitel:

  • 00:00 Begrüßung und Vorstellung
  • 02:15 Vom Banklehrling zum IT-Berater
  • 07:40 Veränderungen in der Bankenwelt seit den 2000er Jahren
  • 15:10 Einstieg in die Selbstständigkeit und erste Projekte
  • 22:05 Gescheiterte Produktidee und der Wechsel zur Beratung
  • 29:15 Erster Kontakt mit Bitcoin und die zweite Begegnung
  • 36:50 Der Roman über Geld und Bitcoin
  • 44:20 Zukunft der Beratung im Banken- und Bitcoin-Umfeld
  • 49:00 Wichtigste Tipps für Vertrieb und Resilienz


Links:

Youtube: youtube.com/@MiesesGeld

Webseite: miesesgeld.de

LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/haraldbetz


---

21 Focus - Der Bitcoin-Unternehmer Podcast

Hallo, mein Name ist Daniel Wingen und ich suche den Austausch mit anderen Unternehmern die in Bitcoin eine wichtiges Werkzeug für ihr Unternehmen sehen. Ich möchte selbst lernen und andere dazu inspirieren sich mit Bitcoin im eigenen Unternehmen zu beschäftigen.

Hier kannst Du Teil der Community werden und mich kontaktieren:

Telegram Community: ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠t.me/B21Focus⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ 

Daniel auf X: ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠x.com/danielwingen⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ 

Daniel auf LinkedIn:⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ linkedin.com/in/danielwingen/⁠

]]>

item.description:

  • Vorstellung von Philipp Zentner und Li.fi
  • Unterschiede zwischen Web2 und Web3 und Anpassung von Geschäftsmodellen an das Web3-Ökosystem

  • Aufbau eines starken Teams und Unterschiede bei der Suche und Bindung von Talenten in Web2 und Web3

item.title: Bitcoin.com News Weekly Update – Trump Threatened Iran, Bitcoin Pumped — Here's What Actually Happened | The Weekly April 6 2026
item.description:
On Easter Sunday, Donald Trump posted a profanity-laced threat on Truth Social demanding Iran open the Strait of Hormuz or face military strikes — and Bitcoin responded by pumping nearly 3% while oil spiked and equity futures dropped. This week, David Sencil and Graham Stone break down what that signal means for crypto, cover a massive $286M DeFi hack on Solana's Drift protocol linked to North Korea's Lazarus Group, unpack the Kalshi and Polymarket prediction market regulatory battles, and debate whether Google's new quantum computing research paper is real Bitcoin FUD or just Y2K 2.0.In this episode:- Trump's Easter Iran threat rattles oil and equities — Bitcoin pumps ~3% instead- Japan declares an energy emergency as Strait of Hormuz closure ripples into East Asia- Doomburg and Rory Johnson on short-term oil price spike vs. long-term collapse below $60- Polymarket faces backlash over "death market" tied to downed US airman — removes it within hours- Nevada court rules Kalshi prediction markets are indistinguishable from illegal gambling- CFTC and DOJ sue Arizona, Connecticut and Illinois to reassert federal jurisdiction over prediction markets- $286M stolen from Drift Protocol in 12 minutes — a 6-month North Korean social engineering operation- Lazarus Group agents met Drift team in person at conferences over months before executing the hack- David's take: all DeFi protocols should implement time-locks on large withdrawals- Google research paper claims breaking Bitcoin's elliptic curve cryptography needs 20x fewer qubits than previously thought- David vs Graham: Is quantum a genuine threat or just Y2K-level FUD?The Weekly | Bitcoin.com NewsChapters:00:21 - Weekly Episode Introduction00:41 - Trump's Profanity-Laced Message01:09 - Market Reactions to Trump's Message02:00 - Oil Market Reactions03:05 - Discussion on Trump's Statements04:15 - Japan's Energy Emergency05:30 - East Asia's Market Reactions06:32 - Oil Price Predictions09:07 - Prediction Markets Controversy13:08 - Legal Challenges for Prediction Markets17:54 - Solana Ecosystem DeFi Hack28:37 - Quantum Computing Threat to Bitcoin

]]>

item.title: Surfin' Bitcoin – 700 000$ le juste prix de Bitcoin — la démonstration d'un gérant institutionnel (Yves Choueifaty)
item.description:
La BCE a une mission unique : la stabilité des prix en euros. Elle a échoué lamentablement. Pendant ce temps, TOBAM lançait en 2017 le premier fond en Bitcoin et est passé de 1 à 25 assureurs référencés en à peine un an.


Dans cet épisode de Surfin' Bitcoin, j'échange avec Yves Choueifaty, fondateur et président de TOBAM, pour comprendre pourquoi Bitcoin n'est pas encore un moyen de paiement et pourquoi c'est une excellente nouvelle.


Entre théorie monétaire, géopolitique et adoption institutionnelle, Yves livre une analyse rigoureuse et pragmatique sur Bitcoin.


Au programme :

➤ Qu'est-ce qui fait qu'un actif devient monnaie et à quelle étape Bitcoin se trouve-t-il vraiment ?

➤ Ce que l'hyperinflation fait concrètement à une société, à une famille, à une économie entière

➤ Pourquoi les Américains ont 10 ans d'avance sur nous et à qui la faute ?

➤ Comment le marché a contourné les résistances institutionnelles pour imposer Bitcoin par le bas

➤ Quel est le seul scénario capable de menacer Bitcoin et pourquoi il ne se produira probablement jamais


Un épisode pour tous ceux qui veulent comprendre Bitcoin au-delà du prix et réaliser que le juste prix selon TOBAM et BlackRock est aujourd'hui de l'ordre de 700 000 dollars.


👉 Formation “Investir en Bitcoin”

→ https://www.investir-en-bitcoin.com/ibtc-replay5


00:00 – Introduction : Yves Choueifaty (TOBAM), fondateur du premier fonds Bitcoin ouvert au monde

04:59 – Bitcoin : réserve de valeur ou cash peer-to-peer ? Ce qu'Aristote aurait répondu

16:04 – Hyperinflation au Liban : quand la monnaie brûle entre les doigts et les salariés courent dépenser leurs sous

22:17 – Dollarisation, stablecoins et loi de Gresham : pourquoi personne ne dépense ses Bitcoin

27:48 – De la pizza à BlackRock : chronologie de l'adoption institutionnelle du Bitcoin et le retard de l'Europe

35:06 – Comment le Bitcoin entre dans l'assurance vie française par le bas : la revanche des CGP sur la BCE

43:33 – Ce qui pourrait tuer Bitcoin, les défis des 10 prochaines années et le conseil final de Yves Choueifaty


👉 Avec StackinSat, épargnez en Bitcoin pour le long terme, sans stress ni effort, et bénéficiez d’une des solutions les plus économiques en Europe.

Créez votre Plan Épargne Bitcoin dès aujourd’hui à partir de 10 €, sans engagement ni abonnement :


👉 https://stackinsat.com/signup/1?r=SURFIN



Pour revoir les autres intervention de Yves Choueifaty chez Surfin'Bitcoin


2025 live :

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=b5Cf13jvqoU


2024 publié sur BFM :

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=appiFw3T418


2022 :

item.title: The Bitcoin Blueprint – 20. The 2024 Bitcoin Halving: What You Need to Know
item.description: <![CDATA[Welcome back to another episode of the Bitcoin Blueprint podcast! In today's episode, we are taking a look a very important and timely subject: The 2024 Bitcoin Halving. In this episode, I review the following: 1. What is the Bitcoin Halving? 2. Why is it important? 3. Historical context of previous halvings 4. Expectations for this coming halving 5. Advice to new Bitcoiners Thanks for taking the time to listen and I hope you enjoy this epidoe!]]>

item.title: BitcoinBázis - Minden, Ami Kriptó – Az IMF Figyelmeztetett: A Régi Pénzügyi Rend Véget Ér
item.description:
Ki mondja meg, mit kezdhetsz a saját pénzeddel?


2026 áprilisában az IMF nyíltan arról beszél, hogy a nemzetközi kereskedelmi és pénzügyi rendszer szerkezetileg változik. Nem átmeneti zavarról van szó – hanem egy új korszak kezdetéről.Ebben a videóban végigmegyünk azon, mi húzódik az IMF tavaszi ülésének háttérében, miért gyengülhet a dolláralapú rendszer, és milyen jövőt kínálnak a CBDC-k, a stabilcoinok – és a Bitcoin.


📌 Miről szól ez a videó?

• Az IMF „Policies Amid a Reset” konferenciájának valódi üzenete

• Geopolitikai blokkosodás, energiasokkok, magas adósság – egyszerre

• A dollár dominanciájának megkérdőjelezése és a BRICS-alternatívák

• CBDC vs. stabilcoin vs. Bitcoin: ki ellenőrzi a pénzed?

• A programozható pénz és a szabadság kérdése


⏱️ Fejezetek

00:00 - 01:16 Bevezetés: valóban átalakul a pénzügyi rendszer?

01:17 - 02:08 Az IMF tavaszi ülése és a „Reset” kifejezés

02:09 - 03:17 Geopolitikai töredezés és kereskedelmi blokkok

03:18 - 04:11 A dollár jövője és az alternatív elszámolási rendszerek

04:12 - 05:38 CBDC, stabilcoinok és a szabályozási harc

05:39 - 06:40 Bitcoin: más alapelv, más logika

06:41 - 07:43 A valódi kérdés: kinél lesz a kontroll?

07:44 - 07:52 Outro


🔗 Felhasznált források:

📄 IMF – Policies Amid a Reset of the International Trade and Financial Systems (2026. február)

https://www.imf.org/en/news/articles/2026/02/08/sp020826-policies-amid-reset-of-international-trade-and-financial-systems

📄 IMF – 2026 AlUla Conference on Emerging Market Economies

https://www.imf.org/en/news/seminars/conferences/2026/02/08/2026-alula-conference-emerging-market-economies

📄 IMF – World Economic Outlook, 2026. április

https://www.imf.org/en/publications/weo/issues/2026/04/14/world-economic-outlook-april-2026

📄 IMF – Spring Meetings 2026 Curtain Raiser (Georgieva előadás)

https://www.imf.org/en/news/articles/2026/04/09/sp040926-spring-meetings-2026-curtain-raiser

📄 IMF – World Economic Outlook Update, 2026. januárhttps://www.imf.org/en/publications/weo/issues/2026/01/19/world-economic-outlook-update-january-2026

📄 Euronews HU – Németország és Olaszország EU-s vészleállítót javasol a globális stabilcoinokra

https://hu.euronews.com/business/2026/04/02/nemetorszag-es-olaszorszag-eu-s-veszleallitot-javasol-a-globalis-stablecoinokra


💬 Kérdés hozzád:


Szerinted a világ egy hatékonyabb, de központosított digitális pénzrendszer felé halad – vagy a Bitcoin és a decentralizált megoldások jelentik a valódi alternatívát? Írd meg kommentben! 👇

item.itunes:summary:
Ki mondja meg, mit kezdhetsz a saját pénzeddel?


2026 áprilisában az IMF nyíltan arról beszél, hogy a nemzetközi kereskedelmi és pénzügyi rendszer szerkezetileg változik. Nem átmeneti zavarról van szó – hanem egy új korszak kezdetéről.Ebben a videóban végigmegyünk azon, mi húzódik az IMF tavaszi ülésének háttérében, miért gyengülhet a dolláralapú rendszer, és milyen jövőt kínálnak a CBDC-k, a stabilcoinok – és a Bitcoin.


📌 Miről szól ez a videó?

• Az IMF „Policies Amid a Reset” konferenciájának valódi üzenete

• Geopolitikai blokkosodás, energiasokkok, magas adósság – egyszerre

• A dollár dominanciájának megkérdőjelezése és a BRICS-alternatívák

• CBDC vs. stabilcoin vs. Bitcoin: ki ellenőrzi a pénzed?

• A programozható pénz és a szabadság kérdése


⏱️ Fejezetek

00:00 - 01:16 Bevezetés: valóban átalakul a pénzügyi rendszer?

01:17 - 02:08 Az IMF tavaszi ülése és a „Reset” kifejezés

02:09 - 03:17 Geopolitikai töredezés és kereskedelmi blokkok

03:18 - 04:11 A dollár jövője és az alternatív elszámolási rendszerek

04:12 - 05:38 CBDC, stabilcoinok és a szabályozási harc

05:39 - 06:40 Bitcoin: más alapelv, más logika

06:41 - 07:43 A valódi kérdés: kinél lesz a kontroll?

07:44 - 07:52 Outro


🔗 Felhasznált források:

📄 IMF – Policies Amid a Reset of the International Trade and Financial Systems (2026. február)

https://www.imf.org/en/news/articles/2026/02/08/sp020826-policies-amid-reset-of-international-trade-and-financial-systems

https://www.imf.org/en/news/seminars/conferences/2026/02/08/2026-alula-conference-emerging-market-economies

https://www.imf.org/en/publications/weo/issues/2026/04/14/world-economic-outlook-april-2026

https://www.imf.org/en/news/articles/2026/04/09/sp040926-spring-meetings-2026-curtain-raiser

item.title: Der Relai Bitcoin Podcast – Die überraschende Kraft des Scheiterns, mit Alan Frei | Relai Bitcoin Podcast #119
item.description:
Alan Frei ist Lifehacker, Unternehmer, Investor und Uber-Eats-Fahrer. So beschreibt er sich bei jedem Intro und gibt dabei Einblick darin, was er seit dem Verkauf seiner Firma Amorana vor 4 Jahren alles so gemacht hat. 

Im Gespräch mit Relai-CEO Julian Liniger erzählt Alan von seinem Werdegang als Unternehmer, welche Lehren er aus 51 gescheiterten Business-Ideen zog, warum Lucky Number 52 dann so einschlug und wie er heute in Start-ups investiert. 

Du findest Alan auf LinkedIn unter: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alanfrei/ 

Oder abonniere seinen Instagram-Kanal: https://www.instagram.com/alanfrei/ 

—

⏱ Kapitel:

00:00 - Intro und Vorstellung

01:26 - Alans Investitionserfahrungen bisher

03:18 - Warum Alan sich tokenisiert hat

06:47 - Alans Traum von Olympia-Curling

09:27 - Weshalb Misserfolg so wichtig ist

14:22 - Wieso persönliches Wachstum für Alan wichtig ist

16:37 - Alans Interesse an Kryptowährungen

21:11 - Bitcoin als Zahlungsmethode, so sieht es Alan

30:04 - Wie die Bitcoin-Community Bitcoin zum Wachsen bringen will

33:37 - Alans bevorstehende Tech-Konferenz in Zürich

35:52 - Wie viele Bitcoin gehören in ein Portfolio?

—

Willst du dir die Sendung lieber anhören? 

🎧Auf Apple Podcast anhören: 

https://podcasts.apple.com/at/podcast/der-relai-bitcoin-podcast/id1543240691 

🎧Auf Spotify anhören: 

https://open.spotify.com/show/4nwQa2HLv2d9GHnGm6GpoO?si=2bd070927706437d 

—

Die in der Sendung geäusserten Meinungen sind die Meinungen der einzelnen Gäste und geben nicht unbedingt die Meinung der Relai AG wieder. Die Informationen im Podcast können ohne Vorankündigung geändert werden, und es wird nicht garantiert, dass sie richtig, vollständig oder aktuell sind.

—

🎓 Lerne Bitcoin besser kennen:

🧠 Kostenloser Bitcoin-Kurs: https://relai.app/de/21-bitcoin-basics/

📥 Kostenloser wöchentlicher Bitcoin-Newsletter: https://relai.app/de/newsletter

👀 Brauchst du Hilfe? Stell uns eine Frage: https://support.relai.app/de

Folge uns:

Instagram: https://instagram.com/relai.app

Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/relai_app

LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/relai

Haftungsausschluss: Relai ist gemäss dem MiCA-Regulierungsrahmen berechtigt, Krypto-Asset-Dienstleistungen in der Schweiz und in der gesamten Europäischen Union anzubieten. Nach Abschluss der Passporting-Verfahren baut das Unternehmen seine Dienstleistungen aktiv auf weitere EU-Mitgliedstaaten aus.

#Bitcoin #Finanzen #Investieren #RelaiApp #SwissBitcoin #StackSats #21BitcoinBasics #BitcoinWissen

item.title: Krypto Corner – Bitcoin, ETF und NFT: Sicher investieren - Krypto verstehen und sicher starten – Bonus zu Kap. 26: Die goldene Krone, Rarity Sniper & die Pyramide der Liquidität
item.description:
Macht dich dein seltenes NFT wirklich reich? In dieser 20-minütigen Bonus-Analyse zerstören unsere KI-Moderatoren Toms Traum vom schnellen Reichtum. Tom glaubt, sein seltenes NFT mit der "goldenen Krone" macht ihn reich. Wir erklären, warum "Seltenheit" in der Krypto-Welt oft nur eine Illusion ist und warum in Wahrheit nur eines zählt: Die unbarmherzige Liquidität des "Floor Price".

Lerne das Konzept der "Pyramide der Liquidität" kennen und erfahre, warum du in Krisenzeiten seltene Kunstwerke nicht einmal mehr verschenken kannst.

Das absolute Highlight dieser Folge: Der steuerliche Ruin durch Tauschgeschäfte. Wir decken auf, warum dich das Finanzamt in der DACH-Region zwingen kann, zehntausende Euro Steuern zu zahlen, wenn du nur ein digitales Bild gegen ein anderes tauschst – und warum der fiktive "gemeine Wert" (Marktwert) dabei dein größter Feind ist!

Die Highlights dieser Bonus-Analyse:

  • Die goldene Krone: Warum Seltenheits-Tools (Rarity Sniper) dich anlügen.

  • Die Pyramide der Liquidität: Warum Profis immer den "Boden" (Floor) kaufen.

  • Der Thin Floor: Das tödliche Risiko, wenn niemand verkaufen will.

  • Die Tausch-Steuerfalle: Warum Krypto-zu-Krypto-Tausch dich in die Insolvenz treiben kann.

Der Ton wechselt von naiver Euphorie hin zu einer knallharten, fast schon brutalen finanzmathematischen Analyse und einer eindringlichen Warnung vor den Steuerbehörden!

🚀 BUCH-RELEASE: Lerne den Markt zu lesen und vermeide die Tausch-Steuerfalle mit „Krypto verstehen – sicher starten“ (Band 1) von Sascha Swen Heiter.

🔥 EXKLUSIVE BUCH-PREVIEW: Dieser Podcast bietet dir einen exklusiven Vorab-Einblick in das Standardwerk der Krypto-Welt. Exklusiv: Nur hier im Podcast erfährst du Details und Insider-Wissen aus den 33 Kapiteln des Buchs.Deep Dive: Wir gehen tiefer als jeder Blogpost. Die echten Metriken für NFT-Analysen und die ultimativen Vermeidungsstrategien für die Tausch-Steuerfalle findest du im offiziellen Buch. Das Buch ist ab sofort überall erhältlich!

⚖️ Rechtlicher Hinweis & Haftungsausschluss (ESSENZIELL): Sämtliche Inhalte dieses Podcasts dienen ausschließlich der allgemeinen Information und Unterhaltung. Alle Angaben erfolgen ohne Gewähr.

  • Keine Beratung: Dieser Podcast stellt zu keinem Zeitpunkt eine Anlageberatung, Rechtsberatung oder Steuerberatung dar.

  • Eigenverantwortung: Krypto-Investments sind hochriskant und können zum Totalverlust führen. Jeder Hörer handelt auf eigene Gefahr und Verantwortung.

  • Steuern: Die steuerliche Behandlung von Kryptowährungen ist komplex. Bitte konsultiere zwingend einen qualifizierten Steuerberater für die aktuelle Rechtslage in der DACH-Region (Deutschland, Österreich, Schweiz) für die Jahre 2025/2026.

  • Haftung: Eine Haftung für Schäden, die aus der Nutzung der hier bereitgestellten Informationen entstehen, wird ausdrücklich ausgeschlossen.

Basiert auf dem Buch von Sascha Swen Heiter. Abonniere den Podcast für dein wöchentliches Krypto-Update!

#Bitcoin #Finanzen #KryptoCorner #Geldanlage #Blockchain #SaschaSwenHeiter #Krypto #Crypto #DACH #Investieren2026 #NFT #FloorPrice #Liquidität #KryptoSteuern #BonusFolge


]]>
